%============================================================================
% COMPANION DOCUMENT — Executive Summary for the University Bodies
% Companion to the report: "The University Spirit in the Digital Age —
%   For an Open, Secure and Mission-Aligned Digital Infrastructure"
%   (title macros: shared/localization.sty — the single source of truth)
%============================================================================
\documentclass[12pt,a4paper,twoside]{article}
% --- instantiation paths (sanctioned delta) ---
\newcommand{\genericroot}{../../..}
\newcommand{\catdir}{\genericroot/categories}% consumed by ../set.tex

% --- Encoding and language ---
\usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[english]{babel}

% --- Page layout (compact for 2-3 pages) ---
\usepackage[top=1.8cm,bottom=1.6cm,left=2.2cm,right=2.2cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{setspace}
\setstretch{1.05}

% --- Typography ---
\usepackage{lmodern}
\usepackage{microtype}

% --- Graphics and colours ---
\usepackage[dvipsnames,table]{xcolor}

% --- Tables ---
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{array}

% --- Lists ---
\usepackage{enumitem}

% --- Symbols (checkmarks, crosses) ---
\usepackage{pifont}
\setlist{nosep,leftmargin=1.5em}

% --- Links ---
\usepackage{xr-hyper}  % must be loaded before hyperref; imports section labels from the assembled book
\usepackage[colorlinks=true,linkcolor=NavyBlue,citecolor=OliveGreen,urlcolor=BrickRed]{hyperref}
% Import section labels from the assembled policy book so \nameref{} resolves section names in the standalone build
\externaldocument{../out/policy-EN}

% --- Bibliography: biblatex + biber ---
\usepackage[backend=biber,
            style=numeric,
            sorting=none,
            sortcites=true,
            maxbibnames=99]{biblatex}
\addbibresource{\genericroot/shared/suit-consolidated.bib}

% --- Bibliography display modes (standard / annotated / full) ---
\usepackage{bib-modes}
\setbibmode{linked}

% --- Glossary with tooltips ---
\usepackage{gls-modes}
\input{\genericroot/shared/glossary-defs}

% --- Localization (key/value layer 0: generic defaults) ---
% \loc{key} routes a generic role-phrase through the suite localization layer.
% The shared defaults are the canonical generic values; the overrides below
% bind each key used in THIS companion to the exact generic role-phrase already
% present in its prose, so the generic edition renders byte-for-byte unchanged.
\usepackage{localization}
\input{\genericroot/shared/localization-defaults}
\setloc{nren-name}{national research-and-education network}
\setloc{pilot-entities}{institution's \gls{hpc} team}
\setloc{ai-regulation}{applicable AI-governance regime}
\setloc{nis2-national-transposition}{national NIS2 transposition}
\setloc{national-notification-platform}{national reporting platform}
\setloc{nis2-supervisory-authority}{competent authority}

% --- Boxes ---
\usepackage{tcolorbox}
\tcbuselibrary{skins,breakable}

% --- Logo ---
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{suit-logo}

% --- Headers ---
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\setlength{\headheight}{15pt}
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyhead[LO,RE]{\small\textit{Executive Summary --- University IT Infrastructure}}
\fancyhead[LE,RO]{\small\thepage}
\fancyfoot[C]{\suitfootlogo}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.4pt}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.4pt}

% --- Watermark (temporarily disabled) ---
%\usepackage[pages=all]{background}
%\backgroundsetup{
%  contents={\sffamily\bfseries CONFIDENTIAL},
%  color=lightgray,
%  scale=7,
%  angle=45,
%  opacity=0.20
%}

% --- No section numbering ---
\setcounter{secnumdepth}{0}

% --- Compact sections ---
\usepackage{titlesec}
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{0.8em}{0.3em}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{0.5em}{0.2em}
\titleformat{\section}{\normalsize\bfseries\color{NavyBlue}}{}{}{}
\titleformat{\subsection}{\small\bfseries\color{MidnightBlue}}{}{}{}

% --- Custom reference-to-main-document command ---
\newcommand{\mainref}[1]{%
  \par\vspace{1pt}
  {\footnotesize\color{gray}\itshape
  $\triangleright$~Full analysis and references: #1
  in the complete suite~\cite{suit-wg}.}\par\vspace{2pt}
}

% --- Coloured principle box ---
\newtcolorbox{principlebox}[1][]{%
  colback=NavyBlue!5!white,
  colframe=NavyBlue!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title=#1,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  sharp corners=south,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

% --- Alert box ---
\newtcolorbox{alertbox}[1][]{%
  colback=BrickRed!5!white,
  colframe=BrickRed!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title=#1,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  sharp corners=south,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

% --- Action box ---
\newtcolorbox{actionbox}[1][]{%
  colback=OliveGreen!5!white,
  colframe=OliveGreen!70!black,
  fonttitle=\bfseries,
  title=#1,
  boxrule=0.5pt,
  sharp corners=south,
  left=6pt, right=6pt, top=4pt, bottom=4pt
}

% --- Prevent vertical stretching ---
\raggedbottom

\input{../set}% Layer-1+2: archetype + institution values (sanctioned delta; loaded LAST so edition values override any document-scope \setloc of the generic shell)
